name: SolarWinds, Inc.
description: SolarWinds Corporation is a leading provider of powerful and affordable IT management software. Founded in 1999, the company specializes in developing solutions for network and systems management, database performance, IT service management, and observability. Their comprehensive portfolio is designed to help organizations of all sizes accelerate business transformation by providing actionable insights and operational resilience across hybrid IT environments. With a strong focus on user-centric design and simplicity, SolarWinds serves a global customer base, including a significant majority of Fortune 500 companies, by enabling them to monitor, manage, and optimize their critical technology infrastructure.
